source_cite: 0x0F LAB_8003f6f4 (inline predicate-chain And/Or evaluator, ghidra1_V2.txt:149432+); 0x10 LAB_8003f878 (block-stack back-jump, :149535+)

On FALSE jump to block_end (block_length-derived like op_for/op_do); Ewhile jumps back to while_start.

source_cite: RE_15_Quellcode_Overlays/STAGE1_full/FUN_801033c8.c:16-40: state2 snaps heading once ([0x6a]=(entity[0x90]&0xf0)<<4), state3 only advances forward on clip-wrap, NO turn slew / NO re-quantize / no revert
fix: Scope the turn-slew to phase 0 only. Phase 0: zb_turn_toward(coarse_yaw, ZB_TURN_RATE); on aligned snap `z->rot_y=(int16_t)(coarse_yaw & 0xFFF)` once then phase=1. Phase 1 (WALK): forward step only, NO zb_turn_toward, NO re-quantize, NO `delta>TURN_RATE -> phase=0` auto-revert. Re-aim only on fresh PURSUE re-entry (phase reset to 0).
